title: International Relations and Security Network ISN.
content:
# International Relations and Security Network ISN.

Contributors: eidgenössische technische hochschule zürich. forschungsstelle für sicherheitspolitik und konfliktanalyse
Date: 2001
Subjects: security, international, peace, research, international relations

An electronic clearinghouse for resources in the field of security and defense studies, peace and conflict research, and international relations. An initiative coordinated by the Center for Security Studies and Conflict Research, features resources in the field of security and defense studies, peace and conflict research, and international relations. Provides access to an annotated links library; a limited area search tool (ISN LASE); a selection of resources on current world affairs; and specialized fact databases.
